grounding_checkpoint_required: Apply migration 0039 (utility_bills table) via Supabase MCP or dashboard SQL editor, then confirm: SELECT * FROM utility_bills ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 5 — table exists and is queryable.
Apply migration 0040 (harness_components INSERT) and confirm: SELECT * FROM harness_components WHERE id = 'harness:streamlit_rebuild_utility_tracker' — row present at 100%.
Load /utility at the Vercel preview URL — page renders with 4 metrics showing — or $0 (no data yet). No 500 error.
Enter one month of data via the form: Month=2026-01, kWh=456, Amount=78.90, Provider=Metergy. Verify row appears in the table below the form after page refreshes.
Re-enter the same month (2026-01) with updated values (e.g. kWh=460). Verify UPDATE semantics: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM utility_bills WHERE month='2026-01' returns 1.
SELECT * FROM agent_events WHERE action='utility_bill_saved' ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 3 — verify F18 events logged.
Enter a month with provider different from Metergy (e.g. 'Other Co') — verify Provider column appears in the table (auto-hide logic works in both directions).
